name: Kitchen Cabinet
overview: A half-hour entertainment series that serves up a delectable combination of political discussion and good food. Each week one of Australia's most respected political commentators - Annabel Crabb - takes a plate and leads us into the homes and hearts of some of our most notable and engaging politicians.

trailers.title: Kitchen Cabinet | Extended Preview | Starts Wednesday, 22 February, 9.30pm, ABC2
